about.title: Your Trusted
about.description: Mountain Tour Samui has been serving international tourists and local visitors for years. We specialize in creating personalized island experiences that go beyond the typical tourist trail.
about.description2: Our experienced local guides speak multiple languages and are passionate about sharing the beauty, culture, and hidden gems of Koh Samui. From stunning temples to pristine beaches, we make every moment count.

about_page.title: Mountain Tour Samui
about_page.subtitle: Passionate about sharing the beauty of Koh Samui
about_page.story: Founded by local Koh Samui residents, Mountain Tour Samui was born out of a deep love for our island home and a desire to share its wonders with the world.
about_page.missionText: To provide authentic, safe, and unforgettable tour experiences that connect visitors with the true spirit of Koh Samui while supporting local communities.

footer.description: Your trusted local tour partner in Koh Samui, Thailand. Creating unforgettable island experiences since 2015.
